% Auto-generated: GitLab CI stage list (.gitlab-ci.yml).
\begin{tabular}{ll}
\toprule
Stage & Notes \\
\midrule
\code{prepare} & Prepare venv / pin pip modules \\
\code{test} & Run repo-level pytest on stratus \\
\code{bench} & Inference seed runs (multi-cluster) \\
\code{synth} & Build SFT data from prior trajectories \\
\code{sft} & Supervised fine-tuning \\
\code{rl} & Reinforcement learning \\
\code{bench\_post} & Re-bench with SFT/RL adapters \\
\code{tts} & Test-time selection over multiple runs \\
\code{report} & Aggregate report job \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
